title: Implement Email Verification via OTP
statement:
Create an email verification system with a simple OTP (One-Time Password) mechanism. 
   Users can request an email verification via a POST request to `/api/verify-email`. 
   After receiving the request, generate a unique OTP and send it to the provided email address using a mock SMTP server (you can use Nodemailer for this).
   Users can then verify their email by sending a GET request to `/api/verify-email/{otp}` or by passing the OTP in the header of a POST request to `/api/verify-email/headers`. 
   If the OTP matches the one generated earlier, update the user's email verification status in the database.
constraints: Must use only the in-memory array or mock database provided.
OTP should be valid for 15 minutes. If the user doesn't verify their email within this time, the OTP becomes invalid.

endpoints.description: Generate OTP and send it to the provided email address.
Verify email by OTP in the header.
